title: CoreVault - Corporate Wellness Programs
seoTitle: CoreVault - Corporate Wellness Programs - Free Fitness Website Template | Multiverse
metaDescription: Bring fitness to your workplace. Customized corporate wellness programs that boost productivity and employee health.
summary: Bring fitness to your workplace. Customized corporate wellness programs that boost productivity and employee health.
description: Bring fitness to your workplace. Customized corporate wellness programs that boost productivity and employee health.
prompt: Build a premium fitness website inspired by CoreVault - Corporate Wellness Programs. Keep the page polished, high-trust, and conversion-ready with responsive sections and clear hierarchy.
layoutNotes: Imported from Website Template Hub as a local source-backed template.
Preview and downloadable code are generated from the original HTML source.
Asset paths are normalized so the template can preview inside Multiverse.
responsiveNotes: Responsive layout comes from the original one-page template source.
Preview uses the real HTML file instead of a synthetic poster image.

files.summary: Main template source file imported from Website Template Hub.
files.content:
CoreVault
Solutions Benefits Case Studies Pricing
Solutions Benefits Case Studies Pricing

Wellness at Work. Results Everywhere.

Comprehensive corporate fitness programs that boost employee health, productivity, and morale. Customized for your organization.

WELLNESS SOLUTIONS

Choose what works for your team

ONSITE

FITNESS CLASSES

Expert trainers deliver yoga, strength, and cardio classes right at your office.

  • Multiple class types
  • Flexible scheduling
  • All fitness levels
MOST POPULAR
HYBRID

DIGITAL PLATFORM

24/7 on-demand fitness classes, tracking, and wellness content accessible anywhere.

  • 500+ video classes
  • Progress tracking
  • Remote-friendly
STRATEGIC

WELLNESS CONSULTING

Custom health strategies tailored to your company culture and employee needs.

  • Custom programs
  • Health assessments
  • ROI tracking

WHY COMPANIES CHOOSE COREVAULT

Measurable impact on your bottom line

Increased Productivity

Fit employees are more focused and productive. Studies show 25% performance boost.

Lower Health Costs

Preventive wellness reduces healthcare claims by up to 20% annually.

Better Retention

Employees value wellness benefits. Improve retention and attraction rates.

Better Culture

Shared wellness builds community, camaraderie, and stronger team bonds.

Mental Health Support

Exercise reduces stress and anxiety. Improves overall employee wellbeing.

Brand Enhancement

Show you care about employees. Build employer brand and reputation.

500+ COMPANIES TRUST COREVAULT

From startups to Fortune 500s, we transform workplace wellness

SUCCESS STORIES

Real results from real companies

47% Participation

Tech startup saw half of employees actively participating in wellness programs within first 3 months.

TechFlow Industries

150 employees

$320K Saved

Fortune 500 financial firm reduced healthcare claims and absenteeism with our comprehensive wellness program.

Capital Trust Bank

2000+ employees

92% Satisfaction

Healthcare organization received overwhelmingly positive employee feedback and improved engagement scores.

MediCare Plus

800 employees

FLEXIBLE PRICING

Scalable solutions for any size organization

STARTER

For small teams

$15 /employee/month
  • Digital platform
  • Wellness content
  • Basic analytics
RECOMMENDED

GROWTH

For growing companies

$28 /employee/month
  • Everything in Starter
  • Monthly onsite classes
  • Health assessments
  • Expert support

ENTERPRISE

For large organizations

Custom
  • Everything in Growth
  • Unlimited onsite programs
  • Wellness consulting
  • Dedicated account manager

TRANSFORM YOUR WORKPLACE

Let's discuss how CoreVault can revolutionize employee wellness at your company.

CoreVault

Corporate wellness reimagined.

Solutions

  • Fitness Classes
  • Digital Platform
  • Consulting
